## Summary

What changed and why. One or two sentences.

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:browser` passes (if UI changed)
- [ ] Docs in `docs/` updated, if a convention or pattern changed
- [ ] New `.vue` components are imported in `test/browser/a11y.spec.ts`

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should know: deliberate trade-offs, follow-up work, links
to related issues.
